query: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS public.get_change_tolerence(); DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS public.get_bu_hierarchy(); CREATE FUNCTION public.get_change_tolerence() RETURNS TABLE(initiative_id text, impacted_bu text, wave text, overall_impact numeric) LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $X$ BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT t."InitiativeID"::text, t."Impacted BU"::text, t."Wave"::text, t."OverAll Impact"::numeric FROM "TMC"."Change -  Tolerence" t; END; $X$; GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.get_change_tolerence() TO anon, authenticated; CREATE FUNCTION public.get_bu_hierarchy() RETURNS TABLE(n1 text, n2 text, n3 text, code text, bu text, id text, lvl text, emp_no numeric) LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $Y$ BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT b."Business units N-1"::text, b."Business units N-2"::text, b."Business units N-3"::text, b."CODE"::text, b."BU"::text, b."ID"::text, b."Level"::text, b."Emp. No."::numeric FROM "TMC"."BUs Hierarchy" b; END; $Y$; GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.get_bu_hierarchy() TO anon, authenticated;
